summary: The user is adjusting their morning routine to wake up earlier and has been struggling to fall asleep before 2 am, which affects their productivity and gym schedule. They are considering switching to a morning gym routine to avoid crowds and are implementing strategies to establish a consistent sleep schedule and prepare for workouts.
facts: The user has been going to the gym at 6:30 pm three times a week and has noticed it getting crowded around that time. The user aims to fall asleep by 12:30 am at the latest and has been setting reminders on their phone to go to bed earlier, starting from 10 pm. The user has been having trouble falling asleep before 2 am, which is affecting their morning routine. The user has been noticing that they are more productive in the late afternoon, around 4 pm. The user is considering switching to a morning gym routine, maybe around 8:30 am, to avoid the crowds. The user plans to gradually adjust their wake-up time and establish a consistent sleep schedule. The user intends to prepare everything the night before to save time in the morning. The user is willing to make the change to prioritize their fitness goals.
